productDisplayName: Flying Machine Men Beige Casual Shoes
description: An eclectic fusion of hot style and cutting edge design, this shoe from flying machine is a great way to attain a cult status. Made with a canvas and leather upper, and a high-ankle cut, this is one great must-have in your casual wardrobe.UpperCanvas upper with a perforated leather patch on the forefoot and leather panels on the sides of the midfoot for absolute breathable comfort Suede backfoot patch for enhanced shoe structureHigh-ankle with a padded tongue and fabric inner lining for sweat-free comfortCushioned footbed with a fabric lining for sweat-free comfort and impact-protectionLace-up system for a snug, customised FitMidsoleEVA midsole for absolute impact protectionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with waffle pattern lugs throughout, and rudges along the upper midfoot for absolute grip and tractionShoe careClean the nubuck patch using a nubuck brushTo clean the canvas, make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water. Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush. Wash off with lukewarm water.
